resources.string: There is a problem with your internet connection

Check your connection and try again. 

If the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to 111.nhs.uk or call 111.

Check your connection and try again. If the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to one one one dot nhs dot uk or call one one one.
\nTry again later. If the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to 111.nhs.uk or call 111.

Try again later. If the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to one one one dot nhs dot uk or call one one one.

You currently cannot use this service. 

If the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to 111.nhs.uk or call 111.

You currently cannot use this service. If the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to one one one dot nhs dot uk or call one one one.
There\'s been a problem loading this page

\nThis could be because your device’s settings are preventing us from opening this page. If the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to 111.nhs.uk or call 111.

This could be because your device’s settings are preventing us from opening this page.\n\nIf the problem continues and you need to book an appointment or get a prescription now, contact your GP surgery directly. For urgent medical advice, go to one one one dot nhs dot uk or call one one one.
We could not download this file. \n\nIf the problem continues and you need to view this document now, contact your GP surgery and request it from them directly.
